nuggets.idea_one_liner: Marriage is a tool for truth-telling, and permanent commitment (handcuffs) is the only environment where that truth is safe.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Redefines marriage away from flickering feelings toward the stable ground of mutual growth in Christ.
nuggets.proof_quote_redacted: The point of marriage is... because they've handcuffed themselves to you forever in front of God, you can tell each other the truth about your problems and work together to overcome them.
proof_anchor_lines: Marriage is being handcuffed to the truth
Handcuffed so you can work through problems safely
nuggets.hook_angle_1_stakes: Why your feelings are a terrible reason to get married.
nuggets.hook_angle_2_identity: The woman who stops hiding from her future husband.
nuggets.first_step_seed: Reflect: Am I looking for a man to make me feel good, or a man I can be safely handcuffed to in the presence of God?
